title: Lucknow Rojgar Mela Recruitment 2026
description: UP Lucknow Rojgar Mela Recruitment 2026 Apply Online through Sewayojan Portal Post Update Date: 12-05-2026 Short Description : UP Rojgar Mela Lucknow Registration 2026 | Uttar Pradesh Employment Office has released a notification for the UP Rojgar Mela Recruitment 2026 in Lucknow through Rojgar Sangam, with a total of 1000 vacancies. Eligible candidates can apply online from within Last Date and the direct application link is available on Rojgar Result | More Other Important Information Such ...
